workItem.title: Richmond CIP Explorer - Hackathon Web App
workItem.description: Build a web app for the Richmond Civic Hackathon (March 27-29, 2026) targeting Pillar 6: A Thriving and Sustainable Built Environment. Solve Problem 1: Transportation Project Visibility & Discoverability. Let residents search by address to find nearby City of Richmond CIP infrastructure projects with plain-language descriptions.
workItem.acceptanceCriteria: Judge can input a Richmond address and see nearby infrastructure projects with plain-language descriptions. App uses real COR CIP Dashboard data (CSV). Clearly labeled as a prototype. Includes equity messaging (SMS CTA on each project card). No fake real-time GPS claims.

rubric.pillar: Pillar 6 - A Thriving and Sustainable Built Environment
rubric.event: Richmond Civic Hackathon - March 27-29, 2026 - VCU Snead Hall

categories.name: Impact
categories.anchor: Does the tool make infrastructure project info findable by a resident who sees construction on their street?

categories.name: User Value
categories.anchor: Is the user a resident who currently has no way to find out what's happening on their block?

categories.name: Feasibility
categories.anchor: Could DPW point residents to this tool? Built from verified data.

categories.name: Innovation
categories.anchor: Conversational lookup, SMS service, or smart notification scores higher than plain ArcGIS embed.

categories.name: Execution
categories.anchor: Judge can input address and see nearby projects with plain-language descriptions.

categories.name: Equity & Inclusion
categories.anchor: Reaches residents without smartphones or digital literacy. Prioritizes high-need neighborhoods.

winsIfYou: Address search using real GeoHub/CIP data
Clearly labeled as proof of concept

userDescription: streetlights001 - Richmond Civic Hackathon entry targeting Pillar 6, Problem 1: Transportation Project Visibility. Web app (React + Leaflet) with address search, CIP project map, plain-language cards. SMS equity CTA on each project card (no Twilio). Data source: COR_CIP_Dashboard_projects.csv.

appDecisions.data: Bundled COR CIP CSV (parsed at build time)
appDecisions.addressSearch: Nominatim (OpenStreetMap geocoder, free, no API key)
appDecisions.sms: CTA text on project card only - no Twilio
appDecisions.deployment: Static build (Vite), deployable to GitHub Pages or Netlify
